name: Saffron Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 box raisins (15 oz.), rinsed and floured
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix boiling water and saffron together and let steep overnight.
2. Add olive oil while milk is cooling.
3. In a bowl, combine sugar and salt.
4. Add scalded milk and olive oil mixture, ¼ cup warm water, saffron, eggs, and yeast to the sugar and salt mixture. Mix well.
5. Gradually add 3 to 4 cups of flour; mix well.
6. Add raisins.
7. Add remaining flour, enough to make a workable dough.
8. Place on a floured board and knead for 15 minutes.
9. Transfer to a greased bowl and grease the top.
10. Let rise until doubled in bulk.
11. Shape into loaves; place in greased pans.
12. Let rise until doubled.
13. Bake at 350°F to 375°F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until hollow sounding when tapped.
